title: Opening for Production Engineer at Marico

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Marico
jsonLd.description:
Marico has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Marico:
Marico is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marico!
